headline: Conflict-intelligent leadership in a messy, anxious world — *Frontiers in Organizational Psychology*
description: New peer-reviewed research develops and validates the Conflict Intelligent Leadership Scale (CIQ-L)—a multidimensional measure of how leaders navigate conflict in turbulent workplaces.

headline: The Way Out: Updated Edition Released in August 2026
description: New practical plans and exercises for individual, social, and systemic change—plus lessons on reforming the institutions that entrench conflict and building sustainable ways to live together.
